items.name: Issue
items.doc: A single scan issue — one violation of one rule in one file.

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new( path: impl Into<PathBuf>, line: usize, col: usize, severity: Severity, rule_id: impl Into<String>, message: impl Into<String>, ) -> Self

items.name: rule_ref
items.doc:
The Rules file that documents this check.
Maps rule_id prefix to the .md file an AI should read.

items.name: identity_key
items.doc: Key used to identify this issue across scans (for [NEW]/[KNOWN] delta).

items.name: display_line
items.doc: Format as VSCode problem-matcher compatible line.

items.name: relative_path
items.doc: Returns the relative path if possible, otherwise the original.
